command:
echo "=== SAKURA: last 5 min of inbound/response activity ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.202 \
  "grep -iE 'inbound|response ready' /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log 2>/dev/null | tail -8"

echo ""
echo "=== REMY: last agent processing activity ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.199 \
  "grep -iE 'tool policy removed|telegram.*send|reply|agent' /tmp/openclaw/openclaw-2026-06-10.log 2>/dev/null | grep -oE '\"message\":\"[^\"]*\"|tool policy removed [0-9]+ tool' | tail -10"

echo ""
echo "=== REMY: any telegram outbound (replies sent)? ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.199 \
  "grep -iE 'sendMessage|telegram.*sent|outbound|reply' /tmp/openclaw/openclaw-2026-06-10.log 2>/dev/null | tail -5 | cut -c1-200"

echo ""
echo "=== Pending on both bots ==="
echo -n "Sakura pending: "; curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw/getWebhookInfo' | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['result'].get('pending_update_count'))" 2>/dev/null
echo -n "Remy pending: "; curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8993450718:AAFes1_h347Wa_t_FIrx_dmpHa8MsNp1G0g/getWebhookInfo' | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['result'].get('pending_update_count'))" 2>/dev/null
